title: Merrill and Bank of America Private Bank Launch AI-Powered Meeting Journey
text: Merrill Wealth Management and Bank of America Private Bank launched AI-Powered Meeting Journey, a workflow tool designed to help financial advisors prepare for, conduct, and follow up on client meetings. The system supports meeting preparation, client insights, meeting summaries, and action items. Bank of America said the tool can save advisors up to four hours per meeting across millions of meetings annually. This is relevant for BAC because wealth management is a major earnings contributor, and advisor productivity can help deepen client relationships, improve service quality, and support asset gathering. The announcement also shows how Bank of America is applying AI to practical internal workflows rather than only customer-facing digital tools. For RAG explanations, this news connects BAC's strategy to technology investment, wealth management growth, and efficiency improvement.
